title: Public engagement on grid infrastructure
body: "This note summarises an expert roundtable held in December 2024, discussing how we can bring the public with us as we accelerate expansion of grid infrastructure to meet the goals of clean power by 2030 and net zero by 2050?  Rapid projects support government departments to understand the scientific evidence underpinning a policy issue or area by convening academic, industry and government experts at a single roundtable. These summary meeting notes seek to provide accessible science advice for policymakers. They represent the combined views of roundtable participants at the time of the discussion and are not statements of government policy. "
